item.name: afc_auth
POST /auth/signup/ — Register a new user account; sends a 6-digit email verification code.
GET /auth/verify/<uidb64>/<token>/ — Email-link verification — activates the user account via uidb64+token URL params.
POST /auth/login/ — Authenticate with IGN/email+password; returns session token.
POST /auth/send-verification-token/ — Send a 6-digit password-reset token to the user's email (lookup by email or uid).
POST /auth/verify-token/ — Validate a password-reset token (by email or uid + token).
POST /auth/resend-token/ — Resend a new password-reset token to the given email (1-minute cooldown).
POST /auth/reset-password/ — Reset account password using a valid reset token.
POST /auth/verify-code/ — Verify the 6-digit email verification code sent at signup to activate the account.
POST /auth/resend-verification-code/ — Resend account activation verification code (4-minute cooldown, only for unverified accounts).
POST /auth/change-password/ — Change the authenticated user's password by verifying the old password first.
POST /auth/edit-profile/ — Update authenticated user's profile (full name, IGN, email, uid, profile picture).
GET /auth/get-user-profile/ — Return full profile + aggregated stats (kills, wins, MVPs, booyahs, tournaments) for the authenticated user.
POST /auth/contact-us/ — Submit a contact-us form; sends an email to the support address.
POST /auth/create-news/ — Create a news article (requires head_admin or news_admin role).
POST /auth/edit-news/ — Edit an existing news article by news_id (requires news author or news_admin).
POST /auth/get-news-detail/ — Fetch a single news article by slug; records a view.
GET /auth/get-all-news/ — Return all news articles ordered by creation date (newest first).
POST /auth/delete-news/ — Delete a news article by news_id (requires author or head_admin/news_admin).
POST /auth/add-role/ — Create a new admin role (requires head_admin).
POST /auth/delete-role/ — Delete an admin role by role_id (requires head_admin; role must have no users).
POST /auth/get-admin-info/ — Return admin account information for the authenticated admin user.
GET /auth/get-all-roles/ — Return all defined roles (role_id, role_name, description).
GET /auth/get-all-user-and-user-roles/ — Return all users with their assigned roles, status, and last login.
POST /auth/suspend-user/ — Suspend a user account by user_id (admin only).
POST /auth/activate-user/ — Re-activate a previously suspended user account by user_id (admin only).
POST /auth/assign-roles-to-user/ — Reset and assign a new set of roles to a user; also upgrades user.role to 'admin' (admin only).
POST /auth/edit-user-roles/ — Replace all roles for a user; passing empty new_role_ids downgrades them to regular player (admin only).
GET /auth/get-admin-history/ — Return all admin action history ordered by timestamp (descending).
GET /auth/get-total-number-of-users/ — Return total user count and count of active (verified) users.
POST /auth/ban-team/ — Ban a team for a specified duration in hours (requires head_admin or teams_admin).
POST /auth/unban-team/ — Lift an active ban on a team by team_id (requires head_admin or teams_admin).
POST /auth/ban-player/ — Ban a player by IGN for a given number of days (requires head_admin or teams_admin).
POST /auth/unban-player/ — Lift an active ban on a player by IGN (requires head_admin or teams_admin).
GET /auth/connect-discord/callback/ — OAuth2 callback from Discord; exchanges code for access token, joins guild, saves discord_id to user, then redirects to frontend.
GET /auth/connect-discord/ — Initiate Discord OAuth2 flow for tournament registration; redirects to Discord authorize URL.
GET /auth/connect-discord-account/ — Initiate Discord OAuth2 flow to link Discord account to user profile; session_token passed as query param.
GET /auth/is-discord-account-connected/ — Return whether the authenticated user has a Discord account linked.
GET /auth/get-all-login-history/ — Return all login history records for all users ordered by creation date.
POST /auth/get-user-login-history/ — Return login history for a specific user identified by username or email.
GET /auth/get-notifications/ — Return all notifications for the authenticated user ordered by creation date.
POST /auth/send-notification/ — Send a notification to a single user by recipient_id (admin only).
POST /auth/send-notification-to-multiple-users/ — Send the same notification message to multiple users by recipient_ids list (admin only).
POST /auth/view-notification/ — Mark a specific notification as read by notification_id.
GET /auth/get-total-players-count/ — Return total count of users with role='player'.
GET /auth/get-active-players-count/ — Return count of active players (role='player', status='active').
GET /auth/get-banned-players-count/ — Return count of banned players (role='player', status='banned').
GET /auth/get-new-players-count/ — Return count of new players who joined this calendar month.
GET /auth/get-average-total-kills-per-player/ — Return average kills per player per match for solo, team, and combined.
GET /auth/get-top-mvp-player/ — Return the player with the most MVP awards.
GET /auth/get-top-winner-player/ — Return the player with the most total wins (solo + team combined).
GET /auth/get-admin-activities/ — Return the latest 100 admin activity log entries ordered by timestamp.
POST /auth/like-news/ — Like a news article by news_id; removes any existing dislike.
POST /auth/dislike-news/ — Dislike a news article by news_id; removes any existing like.
POST /auth/unlike-news/ — Remove the authenticated user's like from a news article.
POST /auth/undislike-news/ — Remove the authenticated user's dislike from a news article.
POST /auth/get-news-likes-dislikes-count/ — Return like/dislike counts for a news article; optionally checks is_liked/is_disliked if session_token is passed in body.
POST /auth/check-discord-membership-v2/ — Check if a Discord user ID is a member of the AFC Discord guild.
POST /auth/check-team-members-discord-membership/ — Batch-check whether a list of Discord IDs are members of the AFC guild.
POST /auth/disconnect-discord-account/ — Unlink the authenticated user's Discord account and clear all pending role assignments.
afc_tournament_and_scrims
POST /events/create-event/ — Create a new event (tournament or scrim) with stages, groups, and matches.

body.raw:
{
  "competition_type": "tournament",
  "participant_type": "squad",
  "event_type": "open",
  "max_teams_or_players": 16,
  "event_name": "AFC Open Cup Season 5",
  "event_mode": "online",
  "start_date": "2026-07-01",
  "end_date": "2026-07-07",
  "registration_open_date": "2026-06-01",
  "registration_end_date": "2026-06-28",
  "prizepool": "$500",
  "number_of_stages": 1,
  "is_draft": false,
  "tournament_tier": "tier_2",
  "event_rules": "Standard AFC rules apply.",
  "is_public": true,
  "is_sponsored": false,
  "stages": [
    {
      "stage_name": "Group Stage",
      "start_date": "2026-07-01",
      "end_date": "2026-07-05",
      "number_of_groups": 2,
      "stage_format": "br - single",
      "teams_qualifying_from_stage": 8,
      "stage_discord_role_id": "123456789",
      "groups": [
        {
          "group_name": "Group A",
          "playing_date": "2026-07-01",
          "playing_time": "19:00",
          "teams_qualifying": 4,
          "match_count": 3,
          "match_maps": [
            "bermuda",
            "kalahari",
            "purgatory"
          ],
          "group_discord_role_id": "987654321"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

item.name: POST /events/edit-event/ — Edit an existing event's metadata, stages, groups, and matches.
POST /events/create-leaderboard/ — Create or update a leaderboard for a specific event group.
GET /events/get-all-events/ — List all published (non-draft) events.
POST /events/get-event-details/ — Get full event details by slug (auth optional; reveals registration status if authenticated).
GET /events/get-all-events-paginated/ — List published events with limit/offset pagination.
GET /events/get-all-tournaments-and-scrims/ — List all published events (minimal fields: id, name, date, status).
GET /events/get-all-tournaments-and-scrims-paginated/ — List all published events with pagination (minimal fields).
GET /events/get-all-tournaments-and-scrims-separated/ — List all published events separated into tournaments and scrims arrays.
GET /events/get-all-tournaments-and-scrims-separated-paginated/ — List published events separated into tournaments/scrims with pagination.
GET /events/get-total-events-count/ — Return the total count of all events (including drafts).
GET /events/get-total-tournaments-count/ — Return count of published tournament-type events.
GET /events/get-total-scrims-count/ — Return count of published scrim-type events.
GET /events/get-upcoming-events-count/ — Return count of published events with status 'upcoming'.
GET /events/get-ongoing-events-count/ — Return count of published events with status 'ongoing'.
GET /events/get-completed-events-count/ — Return count of published events with status 'completed'.
GET /events/get-average-participants-per-event/ — Return average max_teams_or_players across all events.
GET /events/get-most-popular-event-format/ — Return the most frequently used event format.
POST /events/register-for-event/ — Register the authenticated user (solo) or their team (duo/squad) for an event.
POST /events/get-event-details-for-admin/ — Get rich event details including admin analytics (admin role required).
POST /events/seed-solo-players-to-stage/ — Seed registered solo competitors into a stage after registration closes.
POST /events/seed-stage-competitors-to-groups/ — Distribute solo stage competitors into groups within a stage.
POST /events/disqualify-registered-competitor/ — Disqualify a registered competitor from an event.
POST /events/reactivate-registered-competitor/ — Reactivate a previously disqualified registered competitor.
POST /events/delete-event/ — Permanently delete an event and all its related data.
POST /events/remove-all-stage-competitors-from-groups-with-their-discord-roles/ — Remove all competitors from groups in a stage and revoke their Discord roles.
POST /events/send-match-room-details-notification-to-competitor/ — Send a match room details notification to competitors in a group.
POST /events/delete-stage/ — Delete a stage and remove Discord roles from its competitors (admin only).
POST /events/delete-group/ — Delete a group and remove Discord roles from its competitors (admin only).
POST /events/discord-role-progress/ — Get Discord role assignment progress for a specific stage.
POST /events/retry-failed-discord-roles/ — Retry failed Discord role assignments for a stage.
GET /events/get-stage-role-assignment-progress/ — Get the current Discord role assignment progress for a stage.
POST /events/get-all-role-progress/ — Get all Discord role assignment progress records for an event.
POST /events/get-all-user-id-in-stage/ — Get all user IDs for competitors in a given stage.
POST /events/get-all-user-id-in-group/ — Get all user IDs for competitors in a given group.
POST /events/delete-notifications-from-users-in-a-group/ — Delete all notifications for users in a specified group.
POST /events/check-if-user-registered-in-event/ — Check if a user (by email) is registered in a given event.
POST /events/upload-solo-match-result/ — Upload match result stats for a solo-mode match from a file or manual data.
GET /events/get-all-leaderboards/ — Get all leaderboards for a given event.
POST /events/sync-group-discord-roles/ — Assign Discord roles to all competitors in a group.
POST /events/reconcile-group-roles/ — Reconcile Discord group roles for a stage, correcting any assignment drift.
POST /events/get-all-leaderboard-details-for-event/ — Get full leaderboard details (all groups/stages) for an event by slug.
POST /events/get-round-robin-standings/ — Get per-day and cumulative standings for a round-robin stage.
POST /events/advance-group-competitors-to-next-stage/ — Advance the top N competitors from a group into the next stage.
POST /events/advance-round-robin/ — Advance top-N teams from cumulative round-robin standings to the next stage.
POST /events/edit-solo-match-result/ — Edit previously entered solo match result stats.
POST /events/edit-leaderboard/ — Edit leaderboard scoring config (placement points, kill point).
POST /events/remove-non-nigeria-registered-competitors/ — Remove all registered competitors whose country is not Nigeria from an event.
POST /events/delete-match/ — Permanently delete a match and its stats.
POST /events/edit-match-details/ — Edit match room details (room ID, name, password, map).
POST /events/create-leaderboard-manually/ — Manually create a leaderboard record for an event/stage/group.
POST /events/enter-solo-match-result-manual/ — Manually enter solo match result stats row by row.
POST /events/enter-team-match-result-manual/ — Manually enter team match result stats (placement and player kills).
POST /events/edit-match-result/ — Edit an existing match result (solo or team).
POST /events/disqualify-player/ — Disqualify a solo player from a stage group competitor slot.
POST /events/disqualify-team/ — Disqualify a team from a stage group competitor slot.
POST /events/sync-event-registrations-with-discord-roles/ — Sync Discord roles for all registered competitors in an event.
POST /events/get-event-details-not-logged-in/ — Get public event details by slug without authentication.
POST /events/validate-team-roster-discord/ — Validate that all team roster members have connected Discord accounts and are in the server.
GET /events/get-drafted-events/ — List all draft events (requires authentication).
GET /events/get-my-drafted-events/ — List draft events created by the authenticated user.
GET /events/get-total-kills/ — Return aggregate total kills across all solo and team matches.
POST /events/generate-single-use-invite-link-for-private-event/ — Generate a single one-use invite token/link for a private event (admin only).
POST /events/generate-multiple-single-use-invite-links-for-private-event/ — Generate multiple one-use invite links for a private event in bulk (admin only).
POST /events/get-all-invite-links-for-private-event/ — List all invite tokens for a private event with usage status (admin only).
POST /events/check-invite-token-status/ — Check whether a given invite token is valid and unused.
POST /events/leave-event/ — Withdraw the authenticated user's registration from an event.
POST /events/seed-event-competitors-to-stage/ — Seed all registered competitors (solo or team) into a stage (admin only).
POST /events/seed-stage-competitors-to-groups-team/ — Distribute team stage competitors into groups within a stage.
POST /events/upload-team-match-result/ — Upload team match result stats from a file or structured data.
POST /events/add-teams-to-event/ — Manually add teams to an event's registered competitors list (admin).
POST /events/add-teams-to-stage/ — Manually add teams to a stage as stage competitors (admin).
POST /events/add-teams-to-group/ — Manually add teams to a group as group competitors (admin).
GET /events/get-all-tournament-player-match-stats/ — Return all TournamentPlayerMatchStats records.
POST /events/confirm-player/ — Confirm a pending player registration for a team event.
POST /events/reject-player/ — Reject a pending player registration for a team event.
POST /events/get-all-competitors-and-their-sponsor-id/ — Get all competitors and their assigned sponsor IDs for a sponsored event.
POST /events/create-sponsor-account/ — Create a new sponsor user account (head_admin only).
POST /events/assign-sponsor-to-event/ — Assign a sponsor user to an event (head_admin only).
GET /events/get-all-sponsors/ — List all users with the sponsor_admin role.
POST /events/get-list-of-players-in-sponsor-event/ — Get all players across events the authenticated sponsor is linked to.
POST /events/edit-match-scoring-config/ — Update the scoring_settings JSON on a specific match (admin only).
POST /events/get-sponsor-details/ — Get details of a sponsor account including linked events.
POST /events/edit-sponsor-details/ — Edit a sponsor account's profile details.
POST /events/edit-roster/ — Edit the active roster for a team in a tournament event.
POST /events/get-roster-details/ — Get the current roster members for a tournament team.
GET /events/total-members-this-month/ — Return the count of new user registrations this calendar month.
GET /events/total-team-this-month/ — Return the count of new teams created this calendar month.
GET /events/total-active-tournaments/ — Return count of tournaments that are currently active (started but not ended).
GET /events/total-published-news/ — Return the total count of news articles.
POST /events/upload-match-result-image/ — Upload match result screenshot images; GPT-4o extracts and saves stats automatically (admin only).
POST /events/get-match-result-images/ — Retrieve all uploaded result images for a match.
POST /events/delete-match-result-image/ — Delete a specific match result image by ID.
POST /events/cancel-event/ — Set an event's status to 'cancelled' and notify all registered competitors.
POST /events/complete-event/ — Set an event's status to 'completed' and notify all registered competitors.
POST /events/broadcast-announcement/ — Send an in-app notification announcement to all registered competitors in an event.
GET /events/export-participants/ — Export event participant list as a CSV or XLSX file download.
POST /events/verify-event/ — Toggle rankings_verified on an event (platform org admins / head_admin only).
afc_team
POST /team/create-team/ — Create a new team; the authenticated user becomes the team owner and captain.
POST /team/edit-team/ — Edit an existing team's name, logo, join settings, and/or social media links (owner only).
POST /team/invite-member/ — Send an invitation to a player (by email or IGN) to join the authenticated user's team.
POST /team/review-invitation/ — Accept or decline a team invitation by invite_id.
POST /team/rank-teams-into-tiers/ — Calculate and return tier rankings (Tier 1/2/3) for all teams based on tournament/scrims performance.
POST /team/disband-team/ — Permanently delete a team and remove all members (owner only; blocked outside the transfer window).
POST /team/transfer-ownership/ — Transfer team ownership from the current owner to another team member (identified by IGN).
POST /team/send-join-request/ — Send a join request to a team that uses 'by_request' join settings.
POST /team/review-join-request/ — Approve or deny a pending join request (team owner only).
GET /team/view-join-requests/ — List all pending join requests for the team owned by the authenticated user.
POST /team/view-join-requests-for-a-team/ — List all pending join requests for a specific team (no auth required, public).
POST /team/edit-team — Duplicate route (no trailing slash) for editing team details — same view as /team/edit-team/.
GET /team/get-all-teams/ — Return a list of all teams with basic info (no auth required).
POST /team/get-team-details/ — Return full team details (members, stats, tournament performance, ban info) by team name.
POST /team/get-user-current-team/ — Return the team the authenticated user currently belongs to.
POST /team/get-player-details/ — Return public profile and team info for a player by their in-game name (username).
POST /team/generate-invite-link/ — Generate a shareable invite link for the team owned by the authenticated user.
POST /team/respond-invite/<str:invite_id>/ — Accept or decline a team invite via the shareable invite link.
GET /team/get-team-details-based-on-invite/<str:invite_id>/ — Return public team details for a given invite ID without requiring login.
POST /team/manage-team-roster/ — Batch-update management roles and/or in-game roles for team members (owner only).
POST /team/kick-team-member/ — Remove a member from the team (owner only; blocked outside the transfer window).
POST /team/exit-team/ — Leave the team the authenticated user belongs to (blocked outside the transfer window; owner cannot exit).
GET /team/get-number-of-teams/ — Return the total number of teams (no auth required).
POST /team/join-team/ — Directly join an open team (only works when team.join_settings == 'open').
GET /team/get-total-teams-count/ — Return total count of all teams (admin dashboard stat).
GET /team/get-current-active-teams-count/ — Return count of teams that are not banned.
GET /team/get-banned-teams-count/ — Return count of banned teams.
GET /team/get-new-teams-count/ — Return count of teams created in the last 7 days.
GET /team/get-average-members-per-team/ — Return average number of members per team.
GET /team/get-team-with-highest-wins/ — Return the team with the most placement-1 finishes across all tournament matches.
GET /team/get-top-earning-teams/ — Return the top 5 teams sorted by total_earnings descending.
GET /team/admin-search-players/ — Admin: search users by username or email (requires admin/head_admin/teams_admin role); returns up to 10 matches with current team.
POST /team/admin-remove-member/ — Admin: forcibly remove a player from a team (requires admin/head_admin/teams_admin role).
POST /team/admin-add-member/ — Admin: add a player to a team, optionally force-moving them from their current team (requires admin/head_admin/teams_admin role).
GET /team/admin-get-team-event-history/ — Admin: paginated list of events a team has participated in (requires admin/moderator/support role).
POST /team/admin-change-team-tier/ — Admin: manually set a team's tier to 1, 2, or 3 (requires admin/moderator/support role).
POST /team/admin-transfer-team-ownership/ — Admin: transfer team ownership to a different current team member (requires admin/moderator/support role).
afc_awards
POST /awards/categories/add/ — Create a new award category, assigned to an existing section.
GET /awards/categories/view/ — List all award categories with their section names.
DELETE /awards/categories/delete/ — Permanently delete an award category by ID.
POST /awards/categories/edit/ — Update an award category's name and/or section.
POST /awards/nominees/add/ — Create a new nominee with a name and optional video URL.
GET /awards/nominees/view/ — List all nominees with their linked categories.
DELETE /awards/nominees/delete/ — Permanently delete a nominee by ID.
POST /awards/nominees/edit/ — Update a nominee's name and/or video URL.
POST /awards/category-nominee/add/ — Link an existing nominee to an existing category.
POST /awards/category-nominee/view/ — List all nominees assigned to a given category.
DELETE /awards/category-nominee/remove/ — Unlink a nominee from a category.
GET /awards/category-nominee/all/ — Return all sections with their categories and each category's nominees (full tree).
POST /awards/votes/submit/ — Submit a user's votes for a section; each vote specifies a category and a nominee.
POST /awards/sections/add/ — Create a new voting section with a name and maximum votes allowed.
GET /awards/sections/all/ — List all sections (id and name only).
POST /awards/sections/view/ — Fetch details of a single section by ID.
GET /awards/get-total-votes-cast/ — Return the total number of votes cast across all categories.
GET /awards/get-total-voters/ — Return the count of distinct users who have cast at least one vote.
GET /awards/get-votes-per-category/ — Return vote counts grouped by category, sorted descending.
GET /awards/get-votes-per-nominee/ — Return vote percentage per nominee across all categories.
GET /awards/get-votes-per-section/ — Return vote counts grouped by section, sorted descending.
GET /awards/get-voting-timeline/ — Return daily vote counts over time (votes grouped by date).
GET /awards/get-total-votes-per-nominee-per-category/ — Return vote counts broken down by nominee within each category.
afc_shop
POST /shop/add-product/ — Create a new product with one or more variants (admin only).
GET /shop/view-all-products/ — List all products with their variants (admin only).
POST /shop/edit-product/ — Update product fields and/or variant fields by ID (admin only).

body.raw:
{
  "product_id": 1,
  "name": "Free Fire Diamonds Pack Updated",
  "description": "Updated description",
  "product_type": "diamonds",
  "status": "active",
  "is_limited_stock": false,
  "variants": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "sku": "FF-100-V2",
      "title": "100 Diamonds v2",
      "price": "5.49",
      "diamonds_amount": 100,
      "stock_qty": 50,
      "is_active": true,
      "ean": "2345678918765"
    }
  ]
}

item.name: POST /shop/delete-product/ — Soft-delete (archive) a product by setting status to 'archived' (admin only).
POST /shop/deactivate-product/ — Set a product's status to 'inactive', hiding it from customers (admin only).
GET /shop/view-current-stock-status/ — List stock levels and availability for all product variants (admin only).
GET /shop/view-all-orders/ — List all orders (up to 500) with line items (admin only).
GET /shop/orders-today/ — List all orders placed today (admin only).
GET /shop/orders-this-week/ — List all orders placed in the current week (admin only).
GET /shop/orders-this-month/ — List all orders placed in the current month (admin only).
GET /shop/view-all-coupons/ — List all coupons with metadata and validity status (admin only).
POST /shop/create-coupon/ — Create a new discount coupon (admin only).
POST /shop/activate-product/ — Set a product's status to 'active', making it visible to customers (admin only).
GET /shop/view-product-details/ — Get details of a single product (auth commented out — public endpoint).
POST /shop/add-product-variant/ — Add a new variant to an existing product (admin only).
POST /shop/delete-product-variant/ — Hard-delete a product variant by ID (admin only).
POST /shop/add-to-cart/ — Add a product variant to the authenticated user's cart, optionally applying a coupon.
GET /shop/get-my-cart/ — Retrieve the authenticated user's current cart contents and subtotal.
POST /shop/remove-from-cart/ — Remove a specific item from the authenticated user's cart.
POST /shop/update-cart-item-quantity/ — Update the quantity of a cart item; removes it if quantity <= 0.
POST /shop/clear-cart/ — Delete all items from the authenticated user's cart.
POST /shop/buy-now/ — Create an order from a list of items and initialize a Paystack payment transaction.
POST /shop/verify-paystack-payment/ — Verify a Paystack payment by reference, mark the order as paid, and trigger fulfillment.
POST /shop/paystack-webhook/ — Paystack webhook receiver; verifies HMAC-SHA512 signature and processes charge.success events.
GET /shop/get-my-orders/ — List all orders belonging to the authenticated user.
GET /shop/get-order-details/ — Get full details of a specific order owned by the authenticated user.
GET /shop/get-order-details-for-admin/ — Get full order details including customer PII and transaction IDs (admin role required).
POST /shop/mark-order-as-paid/ — Manually mark an order as paid and reduce stock accordingly (admin role required).
POST /shop/delete-coupon/ — Hard-delete a coupon by ID (admin role required).
POST /shop/edit-coupon/ — Edit coupon fields (code, discount_type, discount_value, max_uses, min_order_amount, expiry_date, description) (admin role required).
POST /shop/get-weekly-usage-and-saving-generated/ — Get per-day coupon usage counts and total savings generated over the last 7 days (admin role required).
POST /shop/deactivate-coupon/ — Set a coupon's is_active flag to False (admin role required).
POST /shop/activate-coupon/ — Set a coupon's is_active flag to True (admin role required).
POST /shop/get-total-customer-savings/ — Return total savings generated for customers using a specific coupon (admin role required).
POST /shop/get-total-coupon-uses/ — Return total redemption count for a specific coupon (admin role required).
POST /shop/get-total-revenue-generated/ — Return total revenue from paid orders that used a specific coupon (admin role required).

GET /shop/get-coupon-conversion-rate/ — Return conversion rate (paid orders using coupon / total orders since coupon creation). NOTE: view expects a 'slug' path param but the registered URL has none — the view will error at runtime unless the URL is updated.
POST /shop/get-coupon-details/ — Return full details of a coupon by ID (admin role required).
POST /shop/get-coupon-details-with-code/ — Return full details of a coupon looked up by its code string (admin role required; also used by frontend cart for coupon enrichment).
GET /shop/get-all-fulfillments/ — List all fulfillment records including provider payloads (any authenticated user, but exposes sensitive voucher data — effectively admin use).
GET /shop/test-denom/ — Dev/debug endpoint: fetch denominations for brand_id 113 from Mintroute (no auth, no restrictions).
GET /shop/test-brands/ — Dev/debug endpoint: fetch brands for country_id 2 from Mintroute (no auth, no restrictions).
afc_player
GET /player/get-all-players/ — Return all users with aggregated stats (kills, wins, MVPs, ban status, team name).
POST /player/get-player-details/ — Return detailed stats for a single player (KDR, damage, wins, kills by event type, roles) given their player_id.
afc_player_market
POST /player-market/create-recruitment-post/ — Create a new TEAM_RECRUITMENT or PLAYER_AVAILABLE recruitment post
GET /player-market/get-recruitment-posts/ — List all recruitment posts (both TEAM_RECRUITMENT and PLAYER_AVAILABLE), no auth required
GET /player-market/view-team-recruitment-posts/ — List all TEAM_RECRUITMENT posts with roles, countries, and expiry
GET /player-market/view-player-availability-posts/ — List all PLAYER_AVAILABLE posts with roles, country, and availability type
POST /player-market/apply-to-team/ — Player submits an application to a TEAM_RECRUITMENT post
GET /player-market/view-applications/ — Team owner views all applications to their team's recruitment post, including player stats
POST /player-market/update-application-status/ — Team owner updates an application status: REJECT, SHORTLIST, or INVITE (start trial)
POST /player-market/get-player-contact/ — Team owner retrieves player discord and uid once contact is unlocked on an active trial application
POST /player-market/finalize-trial/ — Team owner finalizes a trial: ACCEPT (sign player), REJECT, or EXTEND
GET /player-market/view-my-applications/ — Authenticated player views all of their own applications with status and stats
GET /player-market/application-details/ — Get full detail of a single application (player, team, post, stats, chat_id); accessible by player or team staff
GET /player-market/trial-chat/messages/ — Fetch all messages in a trial chat (accessible by player or team owner/manager/coach)
POST /player-market/trial-chat/send/ — Send a message in a trial chat; sender must be the player or a team staff member
GET /player-market/trial-chats/ — List all trial chats the authenticated user is a participant in (as player or team staff)
POST /player-market/invite-player-to-trial/ — Team owner/manager/coach sends a direct trial invite to a player who posted a PLAYER_AVAILABLE post
GET /player-market/my-trial-invites/ — Player views all direct trial invites they have received from teams
POST /player-market/respond-to-trial-invite/ — Player accepts or declines a DirectTrialInvite; ACCEPT creates a RecruitmentApplication and TrialChat
GET /player-market/admin/all-trials-and-applications/ — Admin/moderator views all applications system-wide with optional status, team_id, and player_id filters
GET /player-market/post-details/ — Public: fetch full detail of a single recruitment post by post_id
GET /player-market/my-posts/ — Authenticated user views all recruitment posts they created
PATCH /player-market/edit-post/ — Creator edits their recruitment post (expiry, country, roles, availability fields depending on post_type)
DELETE /player-market/delete-post/ — Creator permanently deletes their recruitment post
GET /player-market/view-applications/ — Duplicate URL registration in urls.py (same view_applications handler); behaves identically to the first /player-market/view-applications/ entry
afc_ocr
POST /events/ocr-match-result/ — Upload a match result screenshot, run Gemini OCR, and return a draft OCR session for review.
POST /events/ocr-from-image/ — Run Gemini OCR on an already-stored MatchResultImage (by image_id) and return a new draft OCR session.
GET /events/ocr-sessions/ — List all OCR sessions (admin only), optionally filtered by match_id. Returns up to 100 most recent.
GET /events/ocr-session/<uuid:session_id>/ — GET fetches draft session; PATCH updates a single draft row; DELETE soft-discards the session (status → discarded, irreversible).
PATCH /events/ocr-session/<uuid:session_id>/ — GET fetches draft session; PATCH updates a single draft row; DELETE soft-discards the session (status → discarded, irreversible).
DELETE /events/ocr-session/<uuid:session_id>/ — GET fetches draft session; PATCH updates a single draft row; DELETE soft-discards the session (status → discarded, irreversible).
POST /events/ocr-session/<uuid:session_id>/commit/ — Commit an OCR session: persist name aliases, team notes, and write match stats to the DB; marks session as committed (irreversible).
afc_rankings
GET /rankings/teams/monthly/ — List team rankings for a given month (paginated); ?month=YYYY-MM, defaults to latest populated month.
GET /rankings/teams/quarterly/ — List team quarterly rankings for a season (publish-gated); ?season_id= optional.
GET /rankings/teams/annual/ — List annual team leaderboard entries for a year; ?year= defaults to current year.
GET /rankings/teams/<int:team_id>/score/ — Get a single team's monthly + quarterly score breakdown.
GET /rankings/players/monthly/ — List player monthly rankings; ?month=YYYY-MM, defaults to latest populated month.
GET /rankings/players/quarterly/ — List player quarterly rankings for a season (publish-gated); ?season_id= optional.
GET /rankings/players/annual/ — List annual player leaderboard entries for a year; ?year= defaults to current year.
GET /rankings/players/<int:player_id>/score/ — Get a single player's monthly + quarterly score breakdown.
GET /rankings/seasons/ — GET: public paginated list of all seasons. POST: create a new season (head_admin only).
POST /rankings/seasons/ — GET: public paginated list of all seasons. POST: create a new season (head_admin only).

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Q1 2026",
  "quarter": 1,
  "year": 2026,
  "start_date": "2026-01-01",
  "end_date": "2026-03-31",
  "transfer_window_open": "2026-01-01",
  "transfer_window_close": "2026-01-15",
  "is_active": true,
  "reason": "Creating Q1 2026 season for new year start"
}

item.name: GET /rankings/seasons/current/ — Return the currently active season (is_active=True), or null.
PATCH /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/ — Edit a season's name, dates, transfer window dates, or is_active flag (ranking admins).

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Q1 2026 Updated",
  "start_date": "2026-01-01",
  "end_date": "2026-03-31",
  "is_active": true,
  "reason": "Correcting season end date per admin decision"
}

item.name: PATCH /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/transfer-window/ — Open, close, or extend a season's transfer window (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/transfer-log/ — Paginated list of a season's transfer-window change history (ranking admins, read-only).
PATCH /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/team-tier/<int:team_id>/ — Pin (or clear) a team's tier for a season by hand (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/zero-team/<int:team_id>/ — Zero a team's quarterly score on a ban — sets score=0, tier=Entry, is_zeroed=True (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/unzero-team/<int:team_id>/ — Lift a team's ban-zero — clears is_zeroed so the next recalc restores normal scoring (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/zero-player/<int:player_id>/ — Zero a player's quarterly score on a ban — sets score=0, is_zeroed=True (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/deduct-points/<int:team_id>/ — Apply a manual partial point deduction to a team (accumulates; ranking admins).
POST /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/clear-deduction/<int:team_id>/ — Remove a team's manual point deduction — resets points_deducted to 0 (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/audit-log/ — Filtered, paginated audit log of all ranking admin writes (read-only, ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/teams/<int:team_id>/raw/ — Recompute and return the raw component breakdown behind a team's current-quarter score (read-only, ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/players/<int:player_id>/raw/ — Recompute and return the raw component breakdown behind a player's current-quarter score (read-only, ranking admins).
GET /rankings/ghost-teams/ — GET: paginated list of ghost teams with filters. POST: create a new ghost team with roster (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/ghost-teams/ — GET: paginated list of ghost teams with filters. POST: create a new ghost team with roster (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/ghost-teams/<uuid:ghost_team_id>/ — GET: detail for one ghost team. PATCH: edit name/country/roster (unclaimed only). DELETE: remove a ghost team (non-claimed only).
PATCH /rankings/ghost-teams/<uuid:ghost_team_id>/ — GET: detail for one ghost team. PATCH: edit name/country/roster (unclaimed only). DELETE: remove a ghost team (non-claimed only).
DELETE /rankings/ghost-teams/<uuid:ghost_team_id>/ — GET: detail for one ghost team. PATCH: edit name/country/roster (unclaimed only). DELETE: remove a ghost team (non-claimed only).
POST /rankings/ghost-teams/<uuid:ghost_team_id>/approve-claim/ — Mark a ghost team as claimed — sets claim_status='claimed' (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/ghost-teams/<uuid:ghost_team_id>/revoke-claim/ — Revoke a ghost team claim — resets claim_status to 'unclaimed' (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/scoring-config/defaults/ — Return the constants.py factory-default scoring rules snapshot (ranking admins, read-only).
GET /rankings/scoring-config/ — GET: active scoring config + version history. POST: draft and activate a new scoring config version (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/scoring-config/ — GET: active scoring config + version history. POST: draft and activate a new scoring config version (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/event-tier-rules/reorder/ — Reassign priorities for all tier rules from an ordered list of IDs (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/event-tier-rules/classify/ — Dry-run the first-match-wins tier classifier against a hypothetical event sample (ranking admins, read-only).
GET /rankings/event-tier-rules/ — GET: list tier rules ordered by priority. POST: create a new tier rule (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/event-tier-rules/ — GET: list tier rules ordered by priority. POST: create a new tier rule (ranking admins).
PATCH /rankings/event-tier-rules/<int:rule_id>/ — PATCH: partially update a tier rule's match/conditions/tier/enabled. DELETE: remove a tier rule (ranking admins).
DELETE /rankings/event-tier-rules/<int:rule_id>/ — PATCH: partially update a tier rule's match/conditions/tier/enabled. DELETE: remove a tier rule (ranking admins).
PATCH /rankings/event-tier-config/ — Update the singleton fall-through default tier for events that match no rule (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/tournament-prizes/ — List prize payouts (newest first) with optional ?season_id filter (prize admins, read-only).
POST /rankings/prize/ — Record a new prize payout for a tournament team in NGN (prize admins).
PATCH /rankings/prize/<int:payout_id>/ — PATCH: edit a payout's amount. DELETE: remove a payout (prize admins).
DELETE /rankings/prize/<int:payout_id>/ — PATCH: edit a payout's amount. DELETE: remove a payout (prize admins).
GET /rankings/admin/results/markers/ — List a season's tournaments with their counting-control state and active exclusion counts (ranking admins, read-only).
GET /rankings/event-counting/<int:event_id>/ — GET: counting control state for one event. PATCH: set count_winner/count_placement/count_kills toggles (ranking admins).
PATCH /rankings/event-counting/<int:event_id>/ — GET: counting control state for one event. PATCH: set count_winner/count_placement/count_kills toggles (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/result-exclusions/ — GET: list result exclusions (filter by ?event_id or ?season_id). POST: create a result exclusion for one team or player (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/result-exclusions/ — GET: list result exclusions (filter by ?event_id or ?season_id). POST: create a result exclusion for one team or player (ranking admins).
DELETE /rankings/result-exclusions/<int:exclusion_id>/ — Remove a result exclusion — the freed entity's results count again (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/seasons/<int:season_id>/social/ — List all teams with their social media snapshot for a season (ranking admins, read-only).
PATCH /rankings/admin/seasons/<int:season_id>/social/<int:team_id>/ — Admin corrects a team's social follower counts and handles for a season (ranking admins).

body.raw:
{
  "instagram_followers": 15000,
  "tiktok_followers": 8000,
  "instagram_handle": "@teamhandle",
  "tiktok_handle": "@teamtiktok",
  "reason": "Updating follower counts based on verified screenshots"
}

item.name: POST /rankings/admin/seasons/<int:season_id>/social/<int:team_id>/verify/ — Mark a team's social snapshot as verified so its points count toward the quarterly score (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/admin/seasons/<int:season_id>/social/<int:team_id>/unverify/ — Revoke verification — team's social points drop to 0 on next recalc (ranking admins).
POST /rankings/admin/seasons/<int:season_id>/social/<int:team_id>/connect/ — Admin-side social connect — link a team's IG/TikTok handles (resets to pending-verify; ranking admins).

body.raw:
{
  "instagram_handle": "@teamig",
  "tiktok_handle": "@teamtiktok",
  "instagram_followers": 12000,
  "tiktok_followers": 5000,
  "reason": "Manually linking social accounts on behalf of team captain"
}

item.name: POST /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/run-evaluation/ — Run the quarterly tier evaluation for a season — tiers teams and players, freezes the season (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/recalc-status/ — Best-effort recalc and evaluation status for a season (read-only, ranking admins).
POST /rankings/admin/recalc/ — Manually enqueue a score recalc for a single team or player (ranking admins).
PATCH /rankings/seasons/<int:season_id>/publish/ — Set the rankings_published and/or tiers_published flags for a season (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/teams/quarterly/ — Ungated admin draft preview of team quarterly scores including unpublished tiers (ranking admins).
GET /rankings/admin/players/quarterly/ — Ungated admin draft preview of player quarterly scores including unpublished tiers (ranking admins).
afc_organizers
POST /organizers/admin/create-organization/ — Provision a new organization for an external organizer and attach the owner as an active member with platform organizer role.
GET /organizers/admin/get-all-organizations/ — Paginated oversight list of every organization; filterable by ?status= and ?search=.
GET /organizers/admin/get-organization/<slug:slug>/ — Full oversight detail for one org including all members (with permissions), events, and reports placeholder.
PATCH /organizers/admin/edit-organization/<slug:slug>/ — Partial update of an organization's editable fields (name, slug, email, description, socials, status). True PATCH semantics.
POST /organizers/admin/suspend-organization/<slug:slug>/ — Reversibly freeze (suspend=true) or unfreeze (suspend=false) an organization. Cannot act on soft-deleted orgs.
DELETE /organizers/admin/delete-organization/<slug:slug>/ — Soft-delete an org: flags status=deleted, re-homes its events to AFC (organization=NULL), and marks all members removed.

POST /organizers/admin/manage-organization-member/<slug:slug>/ — AFC-staff override for org roster: action=add attaches/reactivates a member; action=remove soft-removes; action=set_owner transfers ownership.
GET /organizers/get-my-organizations/ — List every organization the current user is an active member of, with their role and effective permissions per org (the org-switcher feed).
GET /organizers/get-organization/<slug:slug>/ — Return the full profile of one org plus the caller's effective permissions. Active members only; non-members receive 403.
PATCH /organizers/edit-organization-profile/<slug:slug>/ — Update an org's public profile (email, description, socials, logo, default_banner). Restricted to the organization owner.
GET /organizers/get-organization-members/<slug:slug>/ — List active members of one org (owner + sub_organizers) with roles and effective permission maps. Any active member may read.
POST /organizers/add-organization-member/<slug:slug>/ — Add an existing user as sub_organizer to the org and grant the platform organizer role. Gated by can_manage_members.

PATCH /organizers/edit-organization-member/<slug:slug>/<int:user_id>/ — Toggle granular permission booleans on one sub_organizer's membership row. Gated by can_manage_members. Owner row is off-limits.
DELETE /organizers/remove-organization-member/<slug:slug>/<int:user_id>/ — Soft-remove a sub_organizer from the org (status=removed). Gated by can_manage_members. Owner cannot be removed.
POST /organizers/design-requests/<slug:slug>/ — POST: submit a leaderboard design request (gated by can_submit_designs); GET: list the org's own design requests (any active member).
GET /organizers/design-requests/<slug:slug>/ — POST: submit a leaderboard design request (gated by can_submit_designs); GET: list the org's own design requests (any active member).
GET /organizers/admin/design-requests/ — AFC-staff triage queue of design requests across every org; filterable by ?status= and ?organization_id=, paginated.
PATCH /organizers/admin/design-requests/<int:request_id>/ — Triage one design request: move its status (open/in_progress/applied/rejected) and/or attach resolution_notes. Stamps handled_by.
POST /organizers/events/<int:event_id>/rate/ — Create or update the caller's 1–5 rating for an event (upsert per user+event). Returns the new score plus updated public aggregate.
GET /organizers/events/<int:event_id>/rating/ — Return an event's public rating aggregate (average + count). Auth optional: includes my_score when a valid Bearer token is present.
POST /organizers/events/<int:event_id>/comment/ — Post a free-text comment on an event. Stored against the user for moderation but anonymous to the organizer when read back.
GET /organizers/event-comments/<int:event_id>/ — Return de-identified comments (text + created_at only) for an event. Gated by org_can_event(can_view_reviews); organizer/AFC admin only.
GET /organizers/metrics/<slug:slug>/ — Aggregate performance metrics for one org: event count, registered teams/players, total kills, average rating. Gated by can_view_metrics.
POST /organizers/report-organization/<slug:slug>/ — File an abuse report against an organization. Open to any logged-in user. Accepts optional event_id (must belong to the org) and evidence image.
GET /organizers/admin/reports/ — AFC-staff triage list of every organization report; filterable by ?status= and ?organization_id=, paginated newest-first.

PATCH /organizers/admin/reports/<int:report_id>/ — Triage one report: update status/resolution_notes and stamp reviewed_by. When exclude_event=true and a named event exists, sets rankings_verified=False (integrity action).

GET /organizers/get-organization-public/<slug:slug>/ — Public (unauthenticated) org profile page: branding, socials, and list of published (non-draft) events. Only active orgs are exposed; suspended/deleted return 404.
afc_partner_api
GET /api/v1/partner/events/ — Paginated list of published events visible to the authenticated partner (gated by can_read_events toggle); supports ?limit and ?offset.
GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/ — Single event detail card for a partner-visible event by slug (gated by can_read_events); returns 404 if event is out of scope.
GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/stages/ — Paginated stages of an event with groups nested inside each stage (gated by can_read_stages); 404 if event out of scope.
GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/matches/ — Paginated matches of an event with room credentials stripped by the serializer firewall (gated by can_read_matches); 404 if event out of scope.

GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/standings/ — Paginated ranked final standings for an event (gated by can_read_standings); rows are pre-ranked in memory then paged; 404 if event out of scope.
GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/teams/ — Paginated tournament teams of an event with per-event aggregated toggled stats (gated by can_read_teams); 404 if event out of scope.

GET /api/v1/partner/events/<slug:event_slug>/players/ — Paginated players who recorded stats in an event, each with per-event (not lifetime) toggled stats scoped to their tournament team (gated by can_read_players); 404 if event out of scope.
POST /partners/admin/create/ — Provision a new Partner record; only name is required, all toggles start OFF (least privilege); requires head_admin or partner_admin role.
GET /partners/admin/list/ — Paginated oversight list of all partners with active-key counts; supports ?status= (active/suspended) and ?search= (name or slug); requires partner-admin role.

GET /partners/admin/<slug:slug>/ — GET returns full partner config (all 14 toggles, scope id-lists, key metadata); PATCH does whitelist-validated partial update of toggles and scope fields; requires partner-admin role.

PATCH /partners/admin/<slug:slug>/ — GET returns full partner config (all 14 toggles, scope id-lists, key metadata); PATCH does whitelist-validated partial update of toggles and scope fields; requires partner-admin role.
POST /partners/admin/<slug:slug>/suspend/ — Freeze (suspend=true) or reactivate (suspend=false) a partner; suspending immediately blocks all their API keys; requires partner-admin role.

POST /partners/admin/<slug:slug>/keys/ — Mint a new API key for the partner; returns the plaintext full key EXACTLY ONCE (never re-fetchable); optional label and rate_limit_per_min override; requires partner-admin role.
POST /partners/admin/keys/<int:key_id>/revoke/ — Permanently revoke a single partner API key by key_id; idempotent — revoking an already-revoked key is a no-op success; requires partner-admin role.

POST /partners/admin/events/<slug:event_slug>/publish/ — Flip Event.partner_published to make the event visible (published=true) or withdraw it (published=false) from the partner API scope; requires partner-admin role.
afc_leaderboard_calc

POST /tournament-leaderboard/upload-match-results/<tournament_id>/<match_number>/ — Upload 1–4 match result images for a given tournament match; synchronously triggers OCR/scoring processing and creates MatchLeaderboard entries.
POST /tournament-leaderboard/create-tournament/ — Admin-only: create a new tournament and bulk-register the given team names to it.
